name: @lcv-ideas-software/cross-review
description: API-first MCP server for multi-model cross-review with unanimous convergence gates.

scripts.prepack: npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org run clean && npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org run build
scripts.test: npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org run build && npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org run npm-v12-release-security-regression && npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org run v4.5.6-runtime-contract-regression && npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org run provider-refresh-smoke && npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org run provider-terminal-smoke && npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org run status-citation-contract-smoke && npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org run v4.5.4-grounding-regression && npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org run v4.5.4-judge-cost-regression && npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org run v4.5.4-cancellation-regression && npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org run v4.5.4-durable-jobs-regression && npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org run v4.5.16-poll-cancel-regression && npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org run v4.5.4-health-activity-regression && npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org run v4.5.4-accounting-preflight-regression && npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org run server-reports-regression && npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org run v4.5.18-grounding-contract-regression && npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org run v4.5.18-durability-regression && npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org run v4.5.18-budget-cache-regression && npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org run v4.5.18-contract-gaps-regression && npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org run v4.5.18-judge-wire-contract-regression && npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org run v4.5.18-session-telemetry-regression && npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org run v4.5.18-pricing-regression && npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org run main-guard-smoke && npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org run evidence-preflight-smoke && npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org run evidence-transport-regression && npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org run evidence-custody-smoke && npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org run truthfulness-preflight-smoke && npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org run source-contract-smoke && npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org run smoke && npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org run runtime-smoke
scripts.check: npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org run format:check && npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org run lint && npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org run biome && npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org run typecheck

author: LCV Ideas & Software
